debug_info.goal:
U : Type
h : ctble U
A : Set U
⊢ ctble ↑A

by
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
  refine' ⟨fun a => f a.val, _⟩
  intro a1 a2 h1
  apply Subtype.ext
  exact hf (Set.mem_def.mp a1.prop) (Set.mem_def.mp a2.prop) h1
